texto: Change is a continuous process. You cannot assess it with the static yardstick of a limited time frame. When a seed is sown into the ground, you cannot immediately see the plant. You have to be patient. With time, it grows into a large tree. And then the flowers bloom, and only then can the fruits be plucked.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Mamata Banerjee sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Change is a continuous process. You cannot assess it with the static yardstick of a limited time …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, change, flowers, útil em momentos de mudanca e flowers.

texto: I am not God. Nor am I Phantom. I am ready to accept any criticism. I have been in politics for decades. Each and every day, in several media, there is criticism of me.
explicacao: Citação de Mamata Banerjee sobre temas ligados a fe. “I am not God. Nor am I Phantom. I am ready to accept any criticism. I have been in politics for d…” articula fe, day, god em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como god e i-am.
